name: Polygonscan
description: Polygon (MATIC) mainnet block explorer API — same tool surface as Etherscan, different chain. ESPECIALLY relevant to Polymarket: their CLOB settles every order on Polygon, so on-chain views of YOUR wallet's USDC balance + ERC-1155 conditional token holdings + USDC transfers to/from Polymarket contracts are all served from here. Whale watching on Polymarket markets means tracking specific Polygon addresses. Free tier: 5 req/sec. Sign up at https://polygonscan.com/apis.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: From your Polygonscan account dashboard at https://polygonscan.com/myapikey. Same Etherscan-family auth model; key is distinct from your Etherscan key.

tools.name: matic_balance
tools.description: Native MATIC balance for an address, in wei. Divide by 1e18 for MATIC. Polymarket users need MATIC for gas; this is how you check they have enough to cancel/place orders.

tools.name: tx_list
tools.description: Normal transactions for an address on Polygon.

tools.name: internal_tx_list
tools.description: Internal contract-to-contract transactions for an address. Polymarket trades route through their CTF Exchange contract — internal txs are what reveal the actual fund movements.

tools.name: erc20_transfers
tools.description: ERC-20 token transfers for an address. Polygon's USDC contract is 0x2791Bca1f2de4661ED88A30C99A7a9449Aa84174 — filter by that to see ALL USDC movements (deposits/withdrawals/Polymarket settlement). Whale-following polymarket players means watching big addresses for USDC out → Polymarket and YES/NO tokens back.

tools.name: erc20_balance
tools.description: ERC-20 balance for an address against one specific token contract on Polygon.

tools.name: tx_status
tools.description: Polygon transaction success/failure status. Useful when a Polymarket order's broker_order_id was registered but you're not sure if the settlement landed.

tools.name: block_by_time
tools.description: Find the closest Polygon block number for a given Unix timestamp.

tools.name: gas_oracle
tools.description: Polygon gas prices in gwei. MATIC gas is much cheaper than ETH but still varies — check before tx-heavy bursts.

tools.name: matic_price
tools.description: Current MATIC/BTC and MATIC/USD prices via Polygonscan's feed.
